buptmod:CenterOfUniverse.NAME: Center of Universe
buptmod:CenterOfUniverse.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! Master. NL At the end of your turn, lose 1 Master.

buptmod:SupportBloodBlooming.NAME: Support: Blood Blooming
buptmod:SupportBloodBlooming.DESCRIPTION: If your HP is above half, add an Eternal Meek to your hand. Otherwise, add a Dead Red Hood to your hand. Exhaust.
buptmod:SupportBloodBlooming.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: If your HP is above half, add an Eternal Meek+ to your hand. Otherwise, add a Dead Red Hood+ to your hand. Exhaust.

buptmod:EternalMeek.NAME: Eternal Meek
buptmod:EternalMeek.DESCRIPTION: Gain 15 Gold. NL Heal 6 HP. NL Gain 1 Max HP. NL Exhaust.
buptmod:EternalMeek.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain 20 Gold. NL Heal 8 HP. NL Gain 2 Max HP. NL Exhaust.

buptmod:DeadRedHood.NAME: Dead Red Hood
buptmod:DeadRedHood.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If fatal, lose 1 Max HP and gain 1 Strength permanently. NL Exhaust.
buptmod:DeadRedHood.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If fatal, lose 1 Max HP and gain 1 Strength permanently. NL Exhaust.
